title: Additional financial obligation for passenger cars extended to Vietnam, Japan and Canada
bodyHtml:
With the Presidential Decision on the Application of Additional Financial Obligation on the Import of Certain Products, the additional financial obligation previously applied to various passenger cars originating from Mexico and the Republic of South Africa via the European Union (EU) has been expanded to include Vietnam, Japan, and Canada.

In order to address the unfair tariff discrepancy against Turkey, the 10% additional financial obligation on various passenger cars originating from Mexico and South Africa will also be applied to conventional, hybrid, and electric passenger cars originating from Vietnam, Japan, and Canada when imported through the EU with an A.TR Movement Certificate.

Due to the expansion of this measure by product and country, the decision will come into effect 30 days later.

Please click here for the decision 9079.
